name: qbit-manage
tagline: An automation utility for managing qBittorrent categories tags and cleanup
description: qBitManage is a self-hosted utility for managing qBittorrent automatically. It handles categories, tags, and cleanup operations via API with simple config and CLI usage.

features.title: qBittorrent Automation
features.description: Automate organization and cleanup of torrents

features.title: Category Management
features.description: Assign and update torrent categories automatically

features.title: Tag Handling
features.description: Add or remove tags based on rules

features.title: Ratio Rules
features.description: Apply ratio and seeding rules to torrents

features.title: Scheduler
features.description: Run management tasks on a schedule
